purpose: Fail closed when a new dynamic HTML sink appears without an explicit source and encoding review.

reviewed_inner_html_files.src/pages/admin/editorial/index.astro: Protected operator UI; action markup is constructed from fixed labels and encoded identifiers.
reviewed_inner_html_files.src/pages/cost-calculator.astro: Local calculator state; labels and source metadata are encoded before interpolation. Retain focused adversarial tests.
reviewed_inner_html_files.src/pages/search.astro: Repository-built search index and user query; displayed fields are escaped before interpolation.

reviewed_html_string_files.src/pages/camps/index.astro: Server-built directory cards; database-derived values and attributes pass through escHtml before set:html.

json_script_rule: JSON script payloads must use JSON.stringify and must never be executable script content.
agent_content_rule: Agent-authored, imported, customer-derived, or database-derived values are untrusted even behind Access. Prefer Astro text interpolation; otherwise use a reviewed contextual encoder.
